zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret De Berkeley於1274年出生時，她的父親Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley29歲，母親Joan de Ferrers27歲。她於1293年之前與Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1320年5月4日享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret De Berkeley于1274年出生时，她的父亲Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley29岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers27岁。她于1293年之前与Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1320年5月4日享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret De Berkeley was born in 1274, her father, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, was 29 and her mother, Joan de Ferrers, was 27. She married Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond before 1293, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 4 May 1320, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret De Berkeley est née en 1274, son père, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond avant 1293, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 mai 1320, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret De Berkeley 1274 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley 29 und ihre Mutter Joan de Ferrers 27. Sie hat vor 1293 in Irland Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Mai 1320 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret De Berkeley è nata il nel 1274, sua padre, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Joan de Ferrers, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond prima del 1293, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 maggio 1320, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret De Berkeleyが1274年に生まれた時，父Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeleyは29歳，母Joan de Ferrersは27歳であった。1293年以前にアイルランドでThomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1320年5月4日に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret De Berkeley(이)가 1274년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1293년 이전 아일랜드에서 Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1320년 5월 4일 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret De Berkeley nasceu em 1274, seu pai, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond antes 1293, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de maio de 1320, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret De Berkeley родилась в 1274 г., её отцу по имени Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond перед 1293 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 мая 1320 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret De Berkeley nació en 1274, su papá, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan de Ferrers, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Thomas Fitzmaurice FitzGerald 2nd Baron Desmond antes de 1293, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1320, a la edad de 46 años.
